name: Canterra Minerals Corp.
description: Canterra Minerals Corp. is a Canadian resource company focused on gold and critical minerals exploration in central Newfoundland, Canada. The company holds an extensive land package in the central Newfoundland gold belt, including the Wilding Gold Project and the Buchans Project, which are highly prospective for gold and volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) deposits containing copper, zinc, and lead. Canterra is led by an experienced management team with a track record of discovery and successful project development.
